message:
🌱 istio: Istio gateway charts >1.18 failing schema validation (#1139)

* 🌱 Add istio: Istio gateway charts >1.18 failing schema validation mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct istio namespace to istio-system

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-57354-istio-gateway-charts-1-18-failing-schema-validation",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Istio gateway charts >1.18 failing schema validation",
+    "description": "Istio gateway charts >1.18 failing schema validation. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your istio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\n### Is this the right place to submit this?\n\n### Bug Description\n\nHello Istio Maintainers,\n\nIstio gateway charts are failing schema validation on Helm `v3.18.5`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Istio gateway charts >1.18 failing schema validation",
+        "description": "Running into the same error. Not sure if this is an isito specific error tho 🤔 \n```\nhelm version\nversion.BuildInfo{Version:\"v3.18.5\", GitCommit:\"b78692c18f0fb38fe5ba4571a674de067a4c53a5\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", GoVersion:\"go1.25.0\"}\n```\n\nEDIT: Helm 3.18.4 works for me\n```yaml\n➜ helm upgrade --install --dry-run --debug istio-ingressgateway istio/gateway \\\n    --create-namespace -n istio-system-system \\\n    --version 1.25.3\nhistory.go:56: 2025-08-14 13:46:41.861662 -0700 PDT m=+0.101366043 [debug] getting history for release istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:164: 2025-08-14 13:46:44.054562 -0700 PDT m=+2.294272334 [debug] preparing upgrade for istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:586: 2025-08-14 13:46:44.059492 -0700 PDT m=+2.299202668 [debug] copying values from istio-ingressgateway (v1) to new release.\nError: UPGRADE FAILED: values don't meet the specifications of the schema(s) \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade istio to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade istio:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade istio istio/istio --namespace istio\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system\nhelm list -n istio-system\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Istio gateway charts >1.18 failing schema… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Running into the same error. Not sure if this is an isito specific error tho 🤔 \n```\nhelm version\nversion.BuildInfo{Version:\"v3.18.5\", GitCommit:\"b78692c18f0fb38fe5ba4571a674de067a4c53a5\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", GoVersion:\"go1.25.0\"}\n```\n\nEDIT: Helm 3.18.4 works for me",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "➜ helm upgrade --install --dry-run --debug istio-ingressgateway istio/gateway \\\n    --create-namespace -n istio-system-system \\\n    --version 1.25.3\nhistory.go:56: 2025-08-14 13:46:41.861662 -0700 PDT m=+0.101366043 [debug] getting history for release istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:164: 2025-08-14 13:46:44.054562 -0700 PDT m=+2.294272334 [debug] preparing upgrade for istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:586: 2025-08-14 13:46:44.059492 -0700 PDT m=+2.299202668 [debug] copying values from istio-ingressgateway (v1) to new release.\nError: UPGRADE FAILED: values don't meet the specifications of the schema(s) in the following chart(s):\ngateway:\n- at '': additional properties 'podAnnotations', 'resources', 'service', '_internal_defaults_do_not_set', 'serviceAccount', 'autoscaling', 'env', 'nodeSelector' not",
+        "helm upgrade --install --dry-run --debug istio-ingressgateway istio/gateway \\\n    --create-namespace -n istio-system-system \\\n    --version 1.24.4\nhistory.go:56: 2025-08-14 13:47:36.744526 -0700 PDT m=+0.044113501 [debug] getting history for release istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:164: 2025-08-14 13:47:38.85096 -0700 PDT m=+2.150553209 [debug] preparing upgrade for istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:586: 2025-08-14 13:47:38.855419 -0700 PDT m=+2.155012584 [debug] copying values from istio-ingressgateway (v1) to new release.\nError: UPGRADE FAILED: values don't meet the specifications of the schema(s) in the following chart(s):\ngateway:\n- at '': additional properties 'service', 'serviceAccount', 'autoscaling', '_internal_defaults_do_not_set', 'env', 'nodeSelector', 'podAnnotations', 'resources' not al",
+        "helm upgrade --install --dry-run --debug istio-ingressgateway istio/gateway \\\n    --create-namespace -n istio-system-system \\\n    --version 1.18.2\nhistory.go:56: 2025-08-14 13:48:14.179661 -0700 PDT m=+0.100404709 [debug] getting history for release istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:164: 2025-08-14 13:48:16.289399 -0700 PDT m=+2.210148293 [debug] preparing upgrade for istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:586: 2025-08-14 13:48:16.294622 -0700 PDT m=+2.215371251 [debug] copying values from istio-ingressgateway (v1) to new release.\nupgrade.go:172: 2025-08-14 13:48:16.433947 -0700 PDT m=+2.354696751 [debug] performing update for istio-ingressgateway\nupgrade.go:366: 2025-08-14 13:48:16.585631 -0700 PDT m=+2.506381376 [debug] dry run for istio-ingressgateway\nRelease \"istio-ingressgateway\" has been upgraded. H"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
